faq.1.answer: Yes, you can download Drivarc for free and use its basic features.
faq.1.question: Is Drivarc free?
faq.2.answer: Yes. Drivarc stores your data securely and protects your privacy. You can optionally use Google Drive backup.
faq.2.question: Is my data safe?
faq.3.answer: Yes, Drivarc can work offline. You can enter and view your data without an internet connection. Your data is automatically synchronized when you connect to the internet.
faq.3.question: Can I use it without internet?
faq.4.answer: Yes, multiple vehicle support and other extra features are available in the premium version.
faq.4.question: Can I add multiple vehicles?
faq.5.answer: Yes. Supports gasoline, diesel, LPG, CNG, electric and hybrid; vehicles can record multiple fuel types and cost comparisons and forecasts are available.
faq.5.question: Does the app support multiple fuel types (gasoline, diesel, LPG, CNG, electric, hybrid)?
faq.6.answer: Currently only works on Android devices. iOS version is also in our plans and will be supported soon.
faq.6.question: Which platforms does it work on?
faq.7.answer: Yes, but this feature is available in the premium version. You can export your fuel history, maintenance records and cost reports.
faq.8.question: Can I scan receipts with OCR?
faq.8.answer: This feature is available in the premium version, but free users can also access it by watching a 30-second ad.
faq.10.question: Can I earn XP and level up?
faq.10.answer: Yes! Earn XP, level up and collect badges with every fuel, maintenance and expense record. Those who reach the top level win unlimited PRO membership!
faq.7.question: Can I export my data?
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most commonly asked questions from our users here.
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
feature.1.desc: Quickly record fuel entries; view consumption and cost reports for petrol, diesel, LPG, CNG and electric.
feature.1.name: Fuel Tracking
feature.2.desc: Scan your fuel receipts with the camera and automatically save the information. Save time, avoid errors.
feature.2.name: Smart Receipt Scanning
feature.3.desc: Oil changes, filter maintenance, tire rotation... Never miss a service appointment with smart notifications.
feature.3.name: Maintenance Reminders
feature.4.desc: Record all your vehicle expenses by category. Detailed tracking for insurance, inspection, parking, fines and more.
feature.4.name: Expense Tracking
feature.5.desc: View your cost distribution with visual charts. Generate monthly and annual reports, export as PDF.
feature.5.name: Detailed Reports
feature.6.desc: Manage multiple vehicles in one account. Track fuel, maintenance and expense records separately for each vehicle.
feature.6.name: Multi-Vehicle Support
feature.7.desc: Earn XP and level up with every fuel entry and maintenance record. Reach the top level and get unlimited PRO membership for free! Enjoy rewards while managing your vehicle.
feature.7.name: Earn with Every Record
feature.8.desc: Optimized local database ensures lightning-fast performance even without internet. Syncs safely in the background.
feature.8.name: Simple, Fast & Offline
feature.9.desc: Export all your vehicle data as professional PDF reports. Ideal for insurance, sales or personal archive.
feature.9.name: PDF Export

problem.1.pain_desc: Taking notes for every fuel purchase is difficult and time-consuming. You don't know where and how much you spend at the end of the month.
problem.1.pain_title: I can't track my fuel expenses
problem.1.solution_desc: Record every fuel purchase in seconds. See your spending with monthly and annual reports.
problem.2.pain_desc: Oil changes, tire rotation, filter maintenance... It's hard to remember which maintenance is due when.
problem.2.solution_desc: Smart reminders based on mileage and date. No risk of missing maintenance.
problem.3.pain_desc: Fuel, maintenance, insurance, tax... You don't know the total of all these expenses.
problem.3.pain_title: I don't know my vehicle's total cost
problem.3.solution_desc: Categorize all your expenses and view them with charts. Keep your budget under control.
problem.4.pain_desc: Taking notes on paper isn't reliable. They can get lost, worn out or become unreadable.
problem.4.pain_title: I track everything with a notepad
problem.4.solution_desc: Your data is stored securely on your device — accessible even without internet. Backup to the cloud with one tap when you want.
problem.5.pain_desc: I don't know my vehicle's average fuel consumption. Am I using it efficiently?
problem.5.pain_title: I wonder about my fuel consumption
problem.5.solution_desc: Automatically calculates your average consumption with every fuel purchase.
problem.6.pain_desc: I can't provide information about maintenance history and expenses when selling my vehicle.
problem.6.pain_title: I have trouble when selling my vehicle
problem.6.solution_desc: Track all your maintenance, fuel and expense records chronologically in the history screen. Export as PDF.
problem.7.pain_desc: Keeping separate notebooks for each vehicle is a hassle. I can't see all vehicles' expenses and maintenance in one place.
problem.7.pain_title: I can't keep track of multiple vehicles
problem.7.solution_desc: Manage all your vehicles in one account. Filter each vehicle's fuel, maintenance and expense records separately.
problem.8.pain_desc: Manually entering fuel receipts and maintenance invoices takes time and leads to errors.
problem.8.pain_title: Manually entering every receipt is tedious
problem.8.solution_desc: Snap a photo of your receipt, information is filled automatically. Save in seconds, make no mistakes.
problems.subtitle: With Drivarc, we offer a practical solution to every problem.
problems.title: We know the problems you face with vehicle management
terms.meta_description: Drivarc application terms of use and conditions. Service description, user responsibilities, privacy and more.
terms.meta_keywords: terms of service, conditions, service agreement, Drivarc
terms.og_description: Drivarc application terms of use and conditions.
terms.section.1.text:
By using the Drivarc application ("Application"), you agree to these Terms of Use ("Terms"). These Terms constitute a binding agreement between you ("User") and Drivarc ("we", "our", "us") regarding the use of the Drivarc mobile application and related services.

Scope: These Terms apply to all users of the Drivarc application, including both free and Premium subscribers.

Version: 2.0 - Effective Date: July 6, 2026

We recommend that you please review these terms before you start using the application. Continuing to use the application means that you accept these terms. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you should not use the application.
terms.section.1.title: 1. Entry and Acceptance
terms.section.10.text:
Drivarc strives to provide the application without interruption, but the following situations may cause service interruptions:

• Updates and Maintenance: Periodic short outages may occur for updates, improvements, or server maintenance. Such outages will be notified as far in advance as possible.

• Technical Malfunctions: Unexpected technical problems, infrastructure failures, or third-party service problems (Google) may cause service interruptions.

• Force Majeure: Situations beyond Drivarc's control, such as natural disasters, war, terrorist acts, legal regulations, or government interventions, may cause service interruptions.

• Internet Connection: Although the application can work offline, an internet connection is required for synchronization and some features.

Drivarc cannot be held responsible for any direct or indirect damages resulting from such interruptions. Service availability is provided "as is" and 100% operation is not guaranteed.
terms.section.10.title: 10. Service Availability
terms.section.11.text:
You can delete your account at any time (Settings > Delete Data). Account deletion is irreversible and all your data will be permanently deleted.

For security reasons, account deletion requires biometric authentication (fingerprint or face recognition) or device screen lock to verify your identity and prevent unauthorized deletion.

To ensure the safety of all our users and the smooth operation of the application, it may be necessary to temporarily restrict or terminate access to your account in the following cases:
• If you violate the terms of use
• When you engage in illegal activities
• When you compromise the security of the application
• When you are inactive for a long time (optional)

Account termination consequences:
• All your data (vehicles, fuel records, maintenance records, expenses) are permanently deleted
• Your Premium subscription continues; To cancel, you must proceed directly through the Google Play Store
• Your downloaded PDF reports remain on your device, but cloud copies are deleted
• Your XP, levels and achievements are permanently deleted and cannot be restored
terms.section.11.title: 11. Cancellation and Termination
terms.section.12.text:
We constantly strive to run the application in the best possible way. However, interruptions or errors may occasionally occur due to technical problems or unexpected circumstances. We cannot be held responsible for any direct damages resulting from the use of the application.

Data within the application (vehicle information, maintenance records, etc.) is provided by users. We are not responsible for the accuracy or timeliness of this data.

Special Disclaimer:

• OCR Receipt Reading: Receipt reading feature is performed using Google ML Kit. OCR results may not be 100% accurate. Users are responsible for verifying OCR results. Drivarc is not responsible for errors resulting from incorrect OCR results.

• Fuel Consumption Calculations: Fuel consumption calculations are based on user-entered data. Actual fuel consumption may vary depending on factors such as driving conditions, weather, traffic and vehicle condition. Calculations are for informational purposes only.

• Maintenance Reminders: Maintenance reminders are based on general recommendations and do not replace manufacturer recommendations. It is the user's responsibility to follow the maintenance schedule recommended by your vehicle manufacturer.

• CO2 Emission Calculations: CO2 emission calculations are estimates and actual emissions may vary. These calculations are for informational purposes only and cannot be used as a substitute for official reports.

• Cost Estimates and Analyzes: Future cost estimates are created by statistical models based on historical data. These estimates are not exact and actual costs may differ. These estimates should not be relied upon for investment or financial decisions.

• Malfunction Prediction (Future Feature): When AI-powered failure prediction features are added, these predictions will be for informational purposes only and are not a substitute for professional mechanics diagnosis.
terms.section.12.title: 12. Disclaimer
terms.section.13.text:
Drivarc accepts no liability in the following cases:

• Indirect Damages: Not responsible for loss of data, loss of time, business interruption, commercial damages or other indirect damages.

• Third Party Services: Google is not responsible for any interruptions or errors of Firebase, Google AdMob or other third party services.

• User Data: It is not responsible for the accuracy, timeliness or completeness of the data entered by users.

• Device Problems: We are not responsible for malfunctions, software problems or compatibility issues that occur on the user's device.

Total Liability: Drivarc's total liability will not exceed the subscription fees paid by the user in the last 12 months. Total liability for free users is limited to 100 TL.

These limits of liability apply to the fullest extent legally permissible.
terms.section.13.title: 13. Limits of Liability
terms.section.14.text:
These Terms of Use are subject to the laws of the Republic of Türkiye. Any dispute regarding these conditions will be resolved in Istanbul (Anatolia) Courts and Enforcement Offices.

Dispute Resolution:
• Consumer Arbitration Committee: For consumer complaints, you can first apply to the Consumer Arbitration Committee.
• Consumer Court: If your complaint is not resolved by the Consumer Arbitration Committee, you can apply to the Consumer Court.
• Mediation: Mediation process can be applied in commercial disputes.
• Court: In case the dispute is brought to court, Istanbul (Anatolia) Courts are authorized.
terms.section.14.title: 14. Legal Applicability
terms.section.15.text: Changes to these Terms of Use will be notified within the application. Notifications will be sent to our users for important changes. Your continued use of the application after changes means that you accept the new terms.
terms.section.15.title: 15. Condition Changes
terms.section.16.text:
The following features may be added to the Drivarc app in the future:

• Fleet Management: Enterprise features for companies to manage multiple vehicles from a single panel. When this feature is added, separate terms of use will apply.

• Artificial Intelligence Supported Malfunction Prediction: Vehicle malfunction prediction from audio or written symptoms. This feature is for informational purposes only and is not a substitute for professional mechanic diagnosis.

• Personal Assistant: Maintenance time and fuel saving recommendations. Recommendations are based on general information and do not constitute professional advice.

• Location-Based Features: Finding nearby fuel stations, shuttles and car washes. Location data will only be collected with user consent.

• Business Partnerships: Integrations with service, insurance and spare parts companies. Such partnerships may be subject to separate terms of use.

When these features are added, the terms of use and privacy policy will be updated. Use of new features will be optional.
terms.section.16.title: 16. Future Features
terms.section.17.text: If you have questions about the terms of use, please contact us through the following channels: Contact Channels: • Email: contact@drivarc.com • In-App Feedback: Settings > Feedback Data Controller: Drivarc We aim to respond to all inquiries within 48 hours on business days.
terms.section.17.title: 17. Communication
terms.section.2.text:
Drivarc is a mobile application that allows vehicle owners to manage their vehicles, keep maintenance records, track fuel consumption and analyze vehicle-related expenses. The application offers these features:

• Vehicle information management
• Maintenance records and reminders
• Maintenance reminders with push notification
• Fuel consumption tracking and analysis
• Cost analysis and reporting
• Receipt reading and feedback system with OCR
• Offline work support
• Multi-device synchronization
• Gamification (XP, level, achievements, streaks)
• PDF report creation and sharing
• Advanced features with premium subscription
terms.section.2.title: 2. Service Description
terms.section.3.text:
You have the following responsibilities when using the application:

• Providing accurate and up-to-date information
• Keeping your account information safe
• Use the application for lawful purposes only
• Not to violate the rights of others
• Not to take actions that could endanger the security of the application.
• Comply with the terms of use of third-party services (Google)
terms.section.3.title: 3. User Responsibilities
terms.section.4.text:
For the safe and trouble-free operation of the application, we kindly ask you to avoid the following actions:

• Not to use the application for illegal purposes
• Not trying to disrupt the security or operation of the application
• Not attempt to gain unauthorized access to other people's accounts
• Not installing malware, viruses or malicious code
• Not reverse engineering the source code of the application.
• Not to copy, modify or distribute any part of the application.
• Not to resell or license the application for commercial purposes.
• Not abusing the XP and gamification system (cheating, automation, fake data)
• Not misusing the OCR system (loading fake receipts)
terms.section.4.title: 4. Usage Restrictions
terms.section.5.text:
The application and all its contents (logo, design, code, texts) belong to Drivarc and are protected by copyright, trademark and other intellectual property laws. Using the application does not give you any ownership rights over these contents.

As users, you own the data you upload to the app (vehicle information, photos, recordings). However, you grant us the necessary permissions to store and synchronize this data within the application.
terms.section.5.title: 5. Intellectual Property Rights
terms.section.6.text:
Drivarc offers gamification features to enhance user experience:

• XP (Experience Points): You earn XP by performing certain actions within the application (adding vehicles, fuel registration, maintenance registration, expense registration, etc.)
• Level System: You level up when you reach certain XP thresholds. Each level has a title.
• Achievements: You earn achievements when you reach certain milestones (first receipt, 100 fuel records, 1000 km, economist, maintenance master, etc.)
• Streaks: You earn streak bonuses by using the app on consecutive days
• Critical Drop: 5% chance to gain 5x XP and get a burst shield

Gamification Rules:

• Daily XP limit: 200 XP/day (anti-cheat protection)
• Device clock control: XP earning will be blocked if clock manipulation is detected
• Cheat detection: Automatic fraud detection systems are applied. XP and achievements of cheating users may be reset
• Right to change: Drivarc reserves the right to change gamification rules, XP values and level thresholds with prior notice
terms.section.6.title: 6. Gamification (XP, Achievements and Streaks)
terms.section.7.text:
Drivarc offers free basic features as well as a Premium subscription option:

Premium Features:
• Cloud photo storage (vehicle, receipt and maintenance photos)
• Advanced PDF reports (graphs, CO2 analysis, recommendations)
• Priority support
• Ad-free experience

Payment Terms:
• Premium subscription is managed through the RevenueCat platform
• Monthly and annual plans available
• Prices are displayed in-app and notified in advance
• Payments are made through the application store (Google Play Store) you are connected to

Automatic Renewal:
• Premium subscription automatically renews
• The next period fee will be charged to your account 24 hours before the end of the current period
• You can turn off auto-renewal at any time in your device's store settings

Cancellation and Refund:
• You can cancel your subscription at any time
• In case of cancellation, you will continue to have access to Premium features until the end of the current payment period
• Return policy is subject to Google Play Store rules
• You must make your return requests directly via Google Play Store.

Price Changes:
• Drivarc reserves the right to change Premium subscription prices
• Price changes do not affect existing subscribers; Valid for new subscribers or renewals only
• Price changes are notified in advance within the application
terms.section.7.title: 7. Premium Subscription and Payment Terms
terms.section.8.text:
Free users may see ads to support the app:

• Ads are served through Google AdMob
• Ads are displayed in a way that does not interrupt the app experience
• Premium subscribers enjoy an ad-free experience
• You can manage your ad preferences on Google's ad settings page
• Drivarc has no control over advertising content but asks you to report inappropriate ads

Ad Formats:
• Banner ads: Small ads at the bottom or top of the screen
• Interstitial ads: Full-screen ads between certain actions
• Rewarded ads: Optionally earn rewards by watching ads

Ad Personalization:
• Google AdMob may use your advertising ID to show personalized ads
• You can disable ad personalization or reset your advertising ID from device settings > Google > Ads
• Your consent is obtained before personalized ads are shown
terms.section.8.title: 8. Advertising Policy
terms.section.9.text: Drivarc may make updates to continually improve and improve the application. We try to notify our users of significant changes as far in advance as possible. Advance notification may not be possible due to emergencies or technical requirements.
terms.section.9.title: 9. Service Changes
terms.title: Drivarc - Terms of Service

privacy.section.1.title: 1. Introduction
privacy.section.1.text:
As the Drivarc application, we value our users' privacy and data security. This Privacy Policy ("Policy") explains what information we collect when you use the Drivarc application ("App"), how we use it, and how we protect it.

Data Controller: Under this Policy, Drivarc is the data controller. You can use the contact information below for any questions or requests regarding our data processing activities.

Policy Version: 2.0 - Effective Date: July 6, 2026

This Policy covers the following topics: Types of data collected, purposes and legal bases of data usage, data retention periods, user rights, third-party services, international data transfers, cookie policy, data security measures, and contact information.
privacy.section.2.title: 2. Data Collection
privacy.section.2.text:
When you use our app, we may collect the following personal data:

• Vehicle Information: Brand, model, year, license plate, VIN number (stored only, not used for any other purpose), color, mileage
• Maintenance Records: Maintenance type, date, mileage, cost, photos
• Fuel Records: Fuel type, liters, amount, date, mileage, efficiency data
• User Information: Google account information (email, name, profile photo)
• Notification Information: Technical information needed to send notifications (device token, preferences)
• Usage Statistics: Anonymous usage data and error reports to improve app performance
• Advertising ID: Device advertising ID used by Google AdMob for ad personalization
• Device Information: Operating system version, device model, app version
• Session and Log Data: In-app interactions, error logs, performance metrics
• Payment Information: Drivarc does not directly collect payment information. Payments are processed by RevenueCat and Google Play Store; Drivarc does not have access to your payment details.
• Receipt Feedback: Optionally, unrecognized receipt photos (for system development)
• Approximate Location: May be used by Google AdMob for ad targeting (can be disabled in device settings)
privacy.section.3.title: 3. Data Usage Purposes
privacy.section.3.text: Your personal data is processed based on the following legal bases and purposes under KVKK Art. 5-6 and GDPR Art. 6: Contractual Necessity (KVKK Art. 5/2-c, GDPR Art. 6/1-b): • To provide app functionality (vehicle tracking, maintenance reminders, fuel analysis) • To send you notifications (maintenance reminders and important notifications) • To synchronize your data across your devices • Premium subscription management and payment processes Explicit Consent (KVKK Art. 5/1, GDPR Art. 6/1-a): • Use of receipt photos you submit to improve the OCR scanning system • Ad personalization (use of Google AdMob advertising ID) • Location data collection (optional) Legitimate Interest (KVKK Art. 5/2-f, GDPR Art. 6/1-f): • To improve the app and fix errors • To collect anonymous usage statistics • To ensure security and fraud prevention • Performance monitoring and error reporting (Sentry) Legal Obligation (KVKK Art. 5/2-c, GDPR Art. 6/1-c): • To fulfill legal obligations • Data breach notification obligations • Cooperation with authorized public authorities
privacy.section.4.title: 4. Data Storage and Security
privacy.section.4.text: Your data is stored in the following ways and retained for the periods specified below: Storage Environments: • Device-First Storage: Your data is stored locally on your device (local-first) • Offline Access: Stored locally on your device for offline access • Backup: Encrypted backups of Premium users are stored in Google Drive Retention Periods: • Vehicle and Maintenance/Fuel Records: Retained while account is active. Permanently deleted upon account deletion. • User Account Information (email, name): Retained while account is active. • Usage Statistics and Log Records: Retained for a maximum of 12 months, then anonymized or deleted. • Error Reports (Sentry): Retained for a maximum of 90 days. • Receipt Photos: Retained until account deletion. Cloud backup available for Premium users. • Payment Records: Retained for 10 years due to legal obligations (Drivarc does not see payment details; retained by RevenueCat/Google Play Store). • Google Drive Backups: Retained until manually deleted. Only the latest 1 automatic backup is kept. Security Measures: • Encryption: All backup data is encrypted with AES-256-GCM standard. The local database is stored unencrypted on your device and is protected only by your device screen lock. • Transmission Security: Data transmission occurs over HTTPS • Data Separation: Each user's data is stored on their own device and their own Google Drive account • Access Control: Only you can access your data. Drivarc does not operate its own servers. To delete your account, go to Settings > Delete Data. When you request data deletion, after your identity is confirmed via biometric authentication, your data will be securely and permanently deleted. Data that must be retained due to legal obligations (if any) is excluded from this scope.
privacy.section.5.title: 5. User Rights
privacy.section.5.text: Under KVKK Art. 11 and GDPR Art. 13-22, you have the following rights. You can use the contact channels in Section 17 to exercise these rights: • Access to Data (KVKK Art. 11/1-a, GDPR Art. 15): You can access all your collected data and learn what data is being processed. • Data Correction (KVKK Art. 11/1-d, GDPR Art. 16): You can correct incorrect or incomplete data. • Data Deletion (KVKK Art. 11/1-e, GDPR Art. 17 - "Right to be Forgotten"): You can delete all your data (Settings > Delete Data). For security, deletion requires biometric authentication (fingerprint or face recognition) or device screen lock. • Data Portability (KVKK Art. 11/1-f, GDPR Art. 20): You can export your data as PDF report (Settings > PDF Report). You can request your data in a structured, commonly used, and machine-readable format. • Restrict Processing (GDPR Art. 18, KVKK Art. 11/1-g): You can request restriction of processing in certain circumstances (e.g., while contesting accuracy). • Right to Object (KVKK Art. 11/1-g, GDPR Art. 21): You can object to processing based on legitimate interest. Your data will then not be processed unless we demonstrate compelling legitimate grounds. • Withdraw Consent (GDPR Art. 7/3): You can withdraw your consent at any time for processing based on explicit consent. Withdrawal does not affect the lawfulness of processing before withdrawal. • Object to Automated Decisions (GDPR Art. 22): You have the right not to be subject to decisions based solely on automated processing, including profiling. • Right to Complain (KVKK Art. 14, GDPR Art. 77): You can lodge a complaint with the Personal Data Protection Authority (KVKK) or the data protection authority of your country of residence. You can exercise the above rights free of charge. Your requests will be concluded within 30 days at the latest. This period may be extended by 30 days due to the complexity or number of your requests, and you will be notified of this.
privacy.section.6.title: 6. Third Party Services
privacy.section.6.text: Our app uses the following third-party services. Each service processes data within the framework of its own privacy policy: 1. Google (Authentication and Account Management) • Data Processed: Email address, name, profile photo • Purpose: Sign in with Google account and authentication • Data Controller: Google LLC / Google Ireland Limited • Policy: https://policies.google.com/privacy 2. Google AdMob (Advertising) • Data Processed: Advertising ID, device information, approximate location, app usage data • Purpose: In-app ad display and personalization • Data Controller: Google LLC / Google Ireland Limited • Policy: https://policies.google.com/privacy • User Options: Ad personalization can be disabled from device settings > Google > Ads 3. Google Drive (Cloud Storage) • Data Processed: Encrypted backup data (vehicle, fuel, maintenance records) • Purpose: Automatic backup and cross-device sync for Premium users • Data Controller: Google LLC / Google Ireland Limited • Policy: https://policies.google.com/privacy 4. Google ML Kit (OCR - Receipt Scanning) • Data Processed: Receipt photos (temporarily processed, not stored on server) • Purpose: Text recognition and digitization from receipts • Data Controller: Google LLC / Google Ireland Limited • Policy: https://policies.google.com/privacy 5. RevenueCat (Subscription Management) • Data Processed: Subscription status, purchase history, app-specific identifier (payment details not stored) • Purpose: Premium subscription management and verification • Data Controller: RevenueCat, Inc. • Policy: https://www.revenuecat.com/privacy • Note: RevenueCat, Inc. (US-based) is subject to Standard Contractual Clauses for international data transfer. See Section 13 for details. 6. Sentry (Error Reporting and Performance Monitoring) • Data Processed: Error logs, performance metrics, device information (does not contain personal data) • Purpose: Detect app errors and monitor performance • Retention Period: 90 days • Data Controller: Functional Software, Inc. (Sentry) • Policy: https://sentry.io/privacy/
privacy.section.7.title: 6.1. Premium Features and Subscription
privacy.section.7.text:
While the Drivarc app offers basic features for free, it offers a Premium subscription option for advanced features:

• Cloud photo storage (vehicle, receipt and maintenance photos)
• Advanced PDF reports (graphs, CO2 analysis, recommendations)
• Priority support
• Ad-free experience

Premium subscription is managed through the RevenueCat platform. Monthly and annual plans are available. You can cancel your subscription at any time. In case of cancellation, you will continue to have access to Premium features until the end of the current payment period. The return policy is subject to the rules of your affiliated app store (Google Play Store).

Premium subscription automatically renews. The next period fee will be charged to your account 24 hours before the end of the current period. You can turn off auto-renewal in your device's store settings.
privacy.section.8.title: 7. Advertising
privacy.section.8.text:
Drivarc app may display advertisements through Google AdMob. These ads are shown to users of the free version of the app.

What you should know about ads:

• Ad Provider: Google AdMob is the third-party ad platform used to display our advertisements.
• Ad Types: Banner ads, interstitial ads, and rewarded ads may be displayed.
• Data Usage: Google AdMob may collect information such as device ID, advertising ID, app usage data, and approximate location to show relevant ads. Collection and processing of this data is subject to Google's privacy policy.
• User Options: Users can disable ad personalization or reset their advertising ID from their device settings.

Premium subscribers enjoy an ad-free experience.
privacy.section.9.title: 8. App Permissions
privacy.section.9.text:
Drivarc app uses the following device permissions:

• Camera Permission: Used for receipt scanning (OCR), taking vehicle photos, maintenance and expense attachments. This permission is optional; if denied, manual entry can be used.

• Notification Permission: Used to send maintenance reminders and important notifications. This permission is optional and can be managed in device settings.

• Storage Permission: Used to save and upload photos and documents. This permission is optional; if denied, photo upload feature will not work.

• Biometric Permission (Fingerprint / Face Recognition): Used for authentication on sensitive operations such as data deletion. Biometric data remains on your device and is never sent to Drivarc.

• Location Permission: Optionally used to record station location during fuel entry. This permission is entirely optional and not mandatory. Location data is only collected when you explicitly enable it.

• Network State: Used to check offline/online status and manage synchronization.

All permissions are used with your notification and consent within the app. You can revoke permissions at any time from your device settings.
privacy.section.10.title: 9. Analytics and Crash Reporting
privacy.section.10.text:
To improve our app and optimize user experience, we use Sentry for error reporting:

• Sentry: Used to report app crashes and errors. Error reports contain technical information about the cause of the error and how to fix it, but do not include your personal data.

Collected data is used solely for app improvements and bug fixes. It is not shared with third parties or used for advertising purposes.
privacy.section.11.title: 10. Data Encryption and Backup
privacy.section.11.text: We provide multi-layered protection for your data security: • Encryption: All backup data is encrypted with AES-256-GCM standard. This is an industry-standard encryption method. • Backup System: For Premium users, your data is automatically backed up to Google Drive. Backup is triggered when changes are made to your data. • Backup Retention: Backups are stored in your Google Drive until manually deleted. Only the latest auto-backup is retained; older auto-backups are cleaned up. • Cloud Storage: Encrypted backups are stored securely in Google Drive. • Local Storage: Your data is stored in SQLite database on your device and is available for offline access. • Synchronization: Cross-device data synchronization occurs over secure connection (HTTPS).
privacy.section.12.title: 11. Data Breach Notification
privacy.section.12.text: Since Drivarc does not operate its own servers, your data is stored only on your device and in your Google Drive account: • Device loss or theft: Your data is protected by your device's screen lock. You can use Google Drive backups for data recovery. • Third-party service breaches: In the event of a data breach at services like Google Drive or Sentry, the relevant service's own notification procedures apply. • Notification: As Drivarc, we will inform you via in-app notification and/or email in case of data breaches reported to us that affect our users.
privacy.section.13.title: 12. Data Sharing
privacy.section.13.text:
Your personal data is not shared with third parties except in the following cases:

• Legal obligations: As required by court order or legal obligations
• Service providers: Only to the extent necessary for service provision with third-party services mentioned in Section 6
• User consent: With your explicit consent

Your data is not shared with third parties in association with your personal identity for advertising purposes.
privacy.section.14.title: 13. International Data Transfer
privacy.section.14.text: Drivarc uses global services such as Google, Google Drive, Google AdMob, and Sentry. Therefore, your data may be processed and stored on servers outside Turkey. The main countries where data is transferred are: the United States (US) and the European Economic Area (EEA) countries. For international transfer of your data, the following safeguards are applied: • Adequacy Decision (KVKK Art. 9, GDPR Art. 45): Data is transferred to countries deemed to have an adequate level of protection by the European Commission. • Standard Contractual Clauses (SCC - GDPR Art. 46): For transfers to countries without an adequacy decision (e.g., US), Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission are applied. These clauses ensure that your data is protected at GDPR level even in the receiving country. • Data Minimization: Only data necessary for service provision is transferred in international transfers. • Additional Safeguards: Google has the necessary certifications and mechanisms for compliance with US data protection laws (e.g., Data Privacy Framework).
privacy.section.15.title: 14. Future Features
privacy.section.15.text:
The following features may be added to Drivarc in the future:

• Fleet Management: Corporate features for companies to manage multiple vehicles from a single dashboard
• AI-Powered Fault Detection: Vehicle fault detection from voice or text symptoms
• Personal Assistant: Maintenance timing and fuel savings recommendations
• Location-Based Features: Find nearby fuel stations, service centers, and car washes
• Business Partnerships: Integrations with service, insurance, and spare parts companies

When these features are added, data collection and usage practices will be updated and users will be notified. Use of new features will be optional.
privacy.section.16.title: 15. Cookies
privacy.section.16.text:
Our app does not directly use cookies. However, Google, Google AdMob, and Google Drive services may use their own cookies.

For third-party cookies, you have the right to:
• Accept all cookies
• Reject non-essential cookies
• Manage your preferences via your device settings > Google > Ads

Your consent is obtained before any third-party cookies are placed. You can withdraw your consent at any time through your device settings.
privacy.section.17.title: 16. Policy Changes
privacy.section.17.text: Changes to this Privacy Policy will be notified within the app. Users will be notified of significant changes. Policy changes take effect on the date they are published within the app.
privacy.section.18.title: 17. Contact
privacy.section.18.text: If you have questions about our privacy policy or want to exercise your data rights, you can contact us through the following channels: Data Controller: Drivarc EU GDPR Representative (GDPR Art. 27): For users residing in the European Economic Area, Drivarc can be reached via the following contact address for GDPR-related matters: contact@drivarc.com Contact Channels: • Email: contact@drivarc.com • In-App Feedback: Settings > Feedback • Data Subject Request: You may submit your requests under GDPR Art. 15-22 and KVKK Art. 11 via email. Your request will be answered within 30 days at the latest. Supervisory Authority: Personal Data Protection Authority (KVKK) Address: Nasuh Akar Mahallesi, Ziyabey Caddesi, 1407. Sokak, No:4, 06520, Balgat / Çankaya / ANKARA / TURKEY Web: https://www.kvkk.gov.tr Contact Center: +90 312 456 25 56 We kindly request that you contact us first before applying to KVKK. If we can resolve your issue, there will be no need for a formal application process.
